title: Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses * Men - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses * Men 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Men Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BRIDGEWAY OF HOPE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides faith-based housing for men for up to 24 months who wish to live clean and sober. Services provided to clients include case management, work force development, assistance with getting ID, and overcoming other barriers to stability. 6655 NE 82nd Avenue Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older who have previously gone through an inpatient treatment program. There is no maximum period of length on when the inpatient program was completed. Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (971) 230-5310 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BRIDGEWAY OF HOPE BRIDGEWAY OF HOPE
